entities.name: Inbound Resurrection Through Friction
entities.context: Framework for resurrecting inbound recruiting by deliberately adding friction rather than removing it

entities.name: Auto-apply tools
entities.context: Failed recruiting tools that removed all barriers, flooding employers with low-signal volume

entities.name: Inbound recruiting
entities.context: Recruiting approach where candidates apply to employers, undermined by low-signal volume

entities.name: Two-sided value exchange
entities.context: Value mechanism where investing job seekers get better matches and employers get higher-signal applicants

entities.name: Effort-based filtering
entities.context: Job board approach that filters for effort and self-knowledge rather than credentials alone

relationships.context: Strategy to revive inbound recruiting through counterintuitive friction
Failed approach that undermined inbound recruiting by removing all barriers
Core mechanism that creates value for both job seekers and employers
Implementation approach requiring candidates to demonstrate stories and self-knowledge
Opposing philosophies - friction removal vs friction addition
